creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 2014-Jan-31, 11:22, Mikhail T. wrote:
>    I must be severely behind the times... Are MAN= and MLINKS= no longer
>    used/supported?

No, all man files are now listed as regular files in pkg-plist. See the
relevant section at https://wiki.freebsd.org/ports/StageDir .

-- 
Pietro Cerutti
The FreeBSD Project
gahr@FreeBSD.org

PGP Public Key:
http://gahr.ch/pgp
